out_of_scope_note: Philosophy-of-mind / AI-engineering proposal sketching a functional definition of machine sentience (assertoric + qualitative sensory signals). No neural data, no empirical study, no circuit-level computational model of the brain — a conceptual / engineering position piece with illustrative implementation sketches. Falls under the 'philosophy of consciousness' and 'pure-ML / AI engineering proposal without biological neural content' OOS categories.
